# Nascraft Digitals

Nascraft Digitals is a premium digital agency specializing in custom software engineering, high-performance web applications, aesthetic user interfaces, and cinematic media production.

## Contact Information
- **Email:** contatcnas@gmail.com
- **Phone:** +91 63696 18775
- **Website:** https://nascraft-digitals.pages.dev

## Core Capabilities

### 1. Software Development
We engineer bespoke, performant, and secure software systems. Our stack includes React, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, Node.js, and MongoDB. We reject templates, building clean, scalable custom solutions.
- **Web Applications:** Custom dashboards, learning platforms, and booking workflows.
- **Mobile Applications:** Scalable cross-platform and native solutions.
- **API Systems:** High-performance RESTful APIs and secure integrations.

### 2. Digital Media & Design
We create premium visual designs and cinematic video productions.
- **Video Editing:** Professional post-production, motion graphics, and color grading.
- **Graphic Design:** Branding guidelines, interface mockups, and corporate identity assets.
- **Photo Retouching:** Product and team image editing for premium web presentation.

### 3. Production Shoots
We run high-end photography and videography shoots.
- **Product Photography:** Creative catalog shots and marketing content.
- **Corporate Profile Shoots:** Promotional videography and corporate storytelling.

## Agency Story & Team
Nascraft Digitals was established in 2024 (originally founded as CyberMonk Studioz) to focus on digital craftsmanship and high-performance system engineering.
- **Srihariharan Ganesh Kumar:** Founder & Creative Lead
- **Aaruhya Kumar:** Co-Founder & Technical Lead
- **Nishanth Ravikumar:** Co-Founder & Business Strategy Consultant

## Key Website Routes
- **Home (`/`):** Agency overview, core DNA, featured projects, and client testimonials.
- **Services (`/services`):** Detailed guide to our Software Development, Digital Media, and Production Shoots capability.
- **Portfolio (`/portfolio`):** Case studies of active client platforms (e.g. NutriIntern, VarahiAstro Trip Planner, CarRental Pro, BillFlow, SpherePulse).
- **About (`/about`):** Detailed narrative of our transition from CyberMonk Studioz to Nascraft Digitals, our values (Craftsmanship, Growth, Partnership), and founder bios.
- **Academy (`/academy`):** Coming soon section highlighting our portfolio-driven learning and training initiatives.
- **Booking (`/booking`):** Multistep consultation planner and contact system.
- **Contact (`/contact`):** Interactive inquiry form and hours of operation.
